game.title: Game

introduction.title: Game introduction
introduction.empty: The organizer is lazy, nothing is here

git.title: Challenge repository

readonly.message: When the game is visible to players, the repository is in read-only mode and local changes cannot be pushed or branches merged. Please use the web interface to manage game data.

writable.message: The game has been hidden, and the repository here can be written to via a Git client. Please note that directly operating on the original data may cause damage to the game data. Please make sure you know what you are doing. After pushing local changes, the platform will automatically perform database synchronization and availability checks. Please wait for the synchronization to complete before performing other operations.

git.cloneTip: Using the following link, you can clone the game data to your local machine. The account used to access the repository should be consistent with the platform account, which makes it easier to back up and migrate later. Please note that user and team information is not included here.
git.listTip: This area is for viewing the basic file structure and commit history. Due to the potentially large size of the repository, organizing the Git database may take a long time.

startAt.label: Start time
startAt.canNotLaterThanEnd: Start time cannot be later than end time

endAt.label: End time
endAt.canNotEarlierThanStart: End time cannot be earlier than start time

registerAt.label: Registration time
registerAt.canNotLaterThanEnd: Registration time cannot be later than the end time

archiveAt.label: Archive time
archiveAt.canNotEarlierThanStart: Archive time cannot be earlier than the start time

awardRate.label: Extra reward score ratio
awardRate.mustBeNumber: Reward ratio must be a number
awardRate.mustBePositiveNumber: Reward ratio must be a positive number

hidden.label: Hidden
hidden.message: After hiding, only administrators can see this game

frozen.label: Frozen
frozen.message: After freezing, players will temporarily be unable to access the challenges

teamSize.label: Team size
teamSize.mustBeNumber: Team size must be a number
teamSize.mustBePositiveNumber: Team size must be a positive number
teamSize.minimum: Team size cannot be less than 1
teamSize.maximum: Team size cannot be more than 99

enableTeamAudit.label: Enable team audit
enableTeamAudit.message: After enabling, teams need to be reviewed before joining

canRegisterAfterStart.label: Allow joining after game starts

enableHammer.label: Enable hammer
enableHammer.message: After enabling, participants can communicate with the challenge setter through the hammer feedback system

outerHammerUrl.label: Outer feedback URL

outerHammerLabel.label: Outer feedback label
outerHammerLabel.placeholder: Please input the outer feedback label
outerHammerLabel.message: If the hammer feedback is not enabled, the platform will guide the player to the external feedback system based on the label here.

delete.requirements: Please note that you must delete all challenges in this game before deleting it. You cannot delete the game if there are any challenges present.
delete.confirm: If you decide to delete the game, please enter the game name {{name}} below

events.title: Event pushing
events.howto: Connect to the following WebSocket address to access the platform event API subscription. You can find the method for connecting to the event API here:
events.tokenWarning: Please note that the event API only authorizing via this token. Be careful not to leak this link.
events.regenerateTokenWarning: Are you sure you want to regenerate the game token? The connected devices will lose their connection.

restrict.confirm: Are you sure to block users outside the selected institutes? (Take effect immediately after clicking!)

game.gotoTraining: Archived, please go to the training page

solved.title: Solved
solved.message: Congratulations, you have captured the flag!

archived.title: Archived
archived.message: Solving after archiving will no longer retrieving pts.

inPeriod.title: In progress
inPeriod.message: Time-limited challenge, you can only solve it during the current time period

unreleased.title: Not Published
unreleased.message: This challenge has not been published, players cannot see it

hidden.title: Hidden
hidden.message: This challenge is hidden, only for admin testing.
hidden.alert: Please click the "Up" button when the challenge is ready. The platform will not automatically change the visibility of the challenge. The auto-publishing function will use time points and the hidden state to calculate the final visibility for players.

up.title: Up
up.message: Are you sure you want to make this challenge public? Once it is public, players can view and solve it after the game starts (please ensure all challenges are in a public state when the game starts, the platform will calculate player visibility based on time points, it won't change this state), and the challenge cannot be modified once published.

down.title: Down
down.message: Are you sure to hide this challenge? You can modify the challenge and make it public again after hiding. Players cannot view or solve the challenge in the hidden state, the platform will never change this state.

tag.label: Challenge tags
tag.placeholder: Please enter tags, separated by /, the first tag will become the category

hint.title: Hints
hint.empty: The challenge setter has not released a hint yet, think it by yourself
hint.unlockConfirm: Are you sure to use {{cost}} pts to unlock this hint?

static.title: Static attachments
static.tip: The files here will be provided to the game players AS THEY ARE.

mapped.title: Dynamic attachments
mapped.tip: The file will be assigned to one of the players in the form of a hash map. If you need to dynamically distribute multiple attachments, please pack them into a zip file.

checker.title: Checker attachments
checker.tip: This file is used for checking and will never be accessed by player.

invisibleBeforeArchive.title: Answer is not visible
invisibleBeforeArchive.message: The answer is not visible before the challenge is archived

hammer.title: Hammer
hammer.solved: The challenge has been solved, congratulations!
hammer.adminGoto: Administrators please go to the game management page to view hammer chat messages.
hammer.outerGoto: Hammer is not enabled for this game. Please send your ticket or feedback here
hammer.outerFollow: Hammer is not enabled for this game. Please follow the organizer's requirements and provide feedback through other channels.

tips.0: The message you send here will be forwarded to the challenge setter along with your status. The challenge setter may reply here or contact you through other IMs.
tips.1: Please note that before the challenge setter replies, you can only send three messages, so please try to combine your questions in one message.
tips.2: For long messages such as logs and code, it is recommended to use an online clipboard to send, for example:

account.minimumLength: Account must be at least 4 characters

account.maximumLength: Account can be at most 32 characters
account.invalid: Account can only contain uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores

password.minimumLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.tooWeak: Password must be between 8-40 characters, and must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character

password.confirmMismatch: The two passwords entered are inconsistent

nickname.minLength: Nickname must be at least 2 characters
nickname.maxLength: Nickname can be up to 32 characters
nickname.placeholder: Please enter a nickname (not recommended using your real name)
nickname.label: Nickname

unverified.message: Your account has not been verified, some features are restricted

code.title: Identification code

unverified.message: Your account has not been verified by email. Please verify before generating the code.

code.tip: This code is used to provide your complete account information to third-party services, including your email, 3rd authentication information, etc. The game organizer may use this code to confirm your identity. Do not provide this code for unknown purposes!

success.message: A password reset email has been sent to your mailbox, please check it.

rateExceeded.message: Too fast! If you did not receive the email, check your spam folder. You can retry sending after 30 minutes.

success.message: Successfully registered, welcome to the CTF world!

register.title: Register
register.oauthRegister: Seems that you have not registered a user before... That's OK! Registering now will directly bind to your 3rd auth account {{key}}, and you can log in directly using it next time.

invalidLink.title: The link is invalid, please check if the email reset link is consistent

success.message: Successfully reset, please log in with the new password

delete.title: Delete account
delete.canNotDeleteWhenGameInProgress: To prevent cheating, you cannot delete your account if you are participating in an ongoing game.

declare.1: Your account will be renamed to [DELETED]_<hash>;
declare.2: All permissions will be removed from your account and login will be prohibited. It cannot be recovered via email. The email can be used to register another account;
declare.3: Account privacy information will be removed, but public content will remain;
declare.4: Game awards and data associated with the account will be retained, but information cannot be provided to prove that it belongs to you.
declare.title: Please note that your account is not actually deleted, but placed in a deactivated and unrecoverable state. The following actions will be performed:

delete.thinkTwice: Please note that since the privacy information related to authentication has been deleted, even if you contact the administrator/operations staff, it will not be possible to restore the disabled account. Please think carefully before proceeding.
delete.confirm: Please read and confirm the above content carefully! If you are sure you want to disable your account, please enter your full account name {{name}} below to confirm:

bye.title: Goodbye
bye.message: Wish to meet you again in sober reality

broken.title: The verification link is broken, please recheck the link from your email

noGameSpecified.title: Not in a valid game path.

noChallengeSpecified.title: Not in a valid challenge path.

shell.tip: Enter a valid {{flag}} directly in this terminal to submit. You can enter {{help}} to get more usage help.

clear.man: Clear the terminal output and start over.

ls.man: List information about <file> (default is current directory).

traversalDetected.title: The remote host rejected directory traversal.

stop.title: Stop the challenge instance service. This command can be used to stop instance service of other challenges here.

restart.title: Restart the challenge instance service. Use this when you accidentally damage the challenge instance.

status.title: Display the status of the challenge instance service.

delay.title: Extend the existence time of the challenge instance. The default service time after starting the challenge instance is one hour. If you think the time is not enough, you can use this command to extend it.

submit.man: Submit the flag for this challenge to the platform.

timeout.title: The checking queue is too long. Please refresh after about five minutes to view the results. Do not resubmit.

whoami.man: Displays the account associated with the current effective user ID.
